news.title:
Brigade Enterprises launches Brigade Belvedere targeting ₹1,100 Cr revenue.
The project begins with two towers and 773 premium residential units.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises launches Brigade Belvedere targeting ₹1,100 Cr revenue.
The project begins with two towers and 773 premium residential units.

news.title:
IndiGo CEO Pieter Elbers resigns; Rahul Bhatia takes interim charge. HG Infra wins ₹401.3 crore railway project in Madhya Pradesh.
Waaree Energies invests ₹30 million in U.S. solar firm. Brigade Enterprises launches industrial park in Bengaluru; UCO Bank keeps MCLR unchanged.
news.summary:
IndiGo CEO Pieter Elbers resigns; Rahul Bhatia takes interim charge. HG Infra wins ₹401.3 crore railway project in Madhya Pradesh.
Waaree Energies invests ₹30 million in U.S. solar firm. Brigade Enterprises launches industrial park in Bengaluru; UCO Bank keeps MCLR unchanged.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises launched a 25-acre industrial park in Devanahalli, offering 2M sq ft space for sectors like Aerospace, Defence, IT, and Data Centres.
Shares of Brigade Enterprises rose 1.66% to ₹674 on the NSE after announcing its foray into industrial real estate.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises launched a 25-acre industrial park in Devanahalli, offering 2M sq ft space for sectors like Aerospace, Defence, IT, and Data Centres.
Shares of Brigade Enterprises rose 1.66% to ₹674 on the NSE after announcing its foray into industrial real estate.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises leased 1.56 lakh sq ft at Brigade Twin Towers, Bengaluru.
Tenants include MANN HUMMEL and Labcorp, highlighting strong demand for premium office spaces.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises leased 1.56 lakh sq ft at Brigade Twin Towers, Bengaluru.
Tenants include MANN HUMMEL and Labcorp, highlighting strong demand for premium office spaces.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises launches 'Brigade Stellaris' housing project in Chennai.
The project has an estimated total value of ₹1,700 crore.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises launches 'Brigade Stellaris' housing project in Chennai.
The project has an estimated total value of ₹1,700 crore.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises partners with Primus Senior Living for senior housing projects in South India.
The projects are expected to have a Gross Development Value of Rs 750 crore.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises partners with Primus Senior Living for senior housing projects in South India.
The projects are expected to have a Gross Development Value of Rs 750 crore.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises reported Q3 FY26 presales of INR1,750 cr, volume 1.33M sq ft, avg realization INR13,142/sq ft, up 16% YoY.
Company plans 12M sq ft launches in 4 quarters; commercial office occupancy at 93%, hotels show steady growth with RevPAR up 17% YoY.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises reported Q3 FY26 presales of INR1,750 cr, volume 1.33M sq ft, avg realization INR13,142/sq ft, up 16% YoY.
Company plans 12M sq ft launches in 4 quarters; commercial office occupancy at 93%, hotels show steady growth with RevPAR up 17% YoY.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises reported Q3 FY26 presales of INR 1,750 Cr and leasing revenue of INR 325 Cr, both up 16% YoY.
Hospitality revenue rose 12% YoY to INR 165 Cr, with occupancy at 76% and ARR increasing 17% YoY to INR 7,852.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises reported Q3 FY26 presales of INR 1,750 Cr and leasing revenue of INR 325 Cr, both up 16% YoY.
Hospitality revenue rose 12% YoY to INR 165 Cr, with occupancy at 76% and ARR increasing 17% YoY to INR 7,852.

news.title: Brigade Enterprises' Q3 consolidated net profit drops to ₹1.87B from ₹2.3B YoY.
news.summary: Brigade Enterprises' Q3 consolidated net profit drops to ₹1.87B from ₹2.3B YoY.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises acquires 2.25 acres in Secunderabad for premium residential project.
The project has an estimated GDV of ₹650 crore, marking expansion in Telangana.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises acquires 2.25 acres in Secunderabad for premium residential project.
The project has an estimated GDV of ₹650 crore, marking expansion in Telangana.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises announces analyst/investor meet on Jan 13, 2026.
Meeting with ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund to be held physically in Bangalore.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises announces analyst/investor meet on Jan 13, 2026.
Meeting with ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund to be held physically in Bangalore.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises issues ₹2B in commercial papers to boost liquidity.
The funds will be used to finance its working capital requirements.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises issues ₹2B in commercial papers to boost liquidity.
The funds will be used to finance its working capital requirements.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises issued Rs.200 Cr commercial papers with a 6.83% discount rate, maturing on 18 Mar 2026.
The CPs are rated A1, issued in favor of Kotak Mahindra Bank, and won't be listed on stock exchanges.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises issued Rs.200 Cr commercial papers with a 6.83% discount rate, maturing on 18 Mar 2026.
The CPs are rated A1, issued in favor of Kotak Mahindra Bank, and won't be listed on stock exchanges.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises acquired 4.04 acres in Neopolis Phase 3 from HMDA.
The purchase cost was ₹118 crore per acre.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises acquired 4.04 acres in Neopolis Phase 3 from HMDA.
The purchase cost was ₹118 crore per acre.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises bids Rs 1.18B/acre for 4-acre land in Hyderabad.
The company aims to expand its real estate operations in the city.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises bids Rs 1.18B/acre for 4-acre land in Hyderabad.
The company aims to expand its real estate operations in the city.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises faces a GST demand of ₹695M, raising financial concerns.
The demand may have potential operational impacts on the company.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises faces a GST demand of ₹695M, raising financial concerns.
The demand may have potential operational impacts on the company.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises received a GST show cause notice alleging Rs 91.8 Cr undervaluation.
The Rs 386 Cr demand covers ongoing projects; the company plans to contest.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises received a GST show cause notice alleging Rs 91.8 Cr undervaluation.
The Rs 386 Cr demand covers ongoing projects; the company plans to contest.

news.title:
Brigade announces partnership for high-end housing in Hyderabad, targeting 0.5M sq. ft. growth.
Project forecasts over ₹800 crores revenue potential, highlighting strong growth prospects.
news.summary:
Brigade announces partnership for high-end housing in Hyderabad, targeting 0.5M sq. ft. growth.
Project forecasts over ₹800 crores revenue potential, highlighting strong growth prospects.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises signs JDA for 0.5M sq.ft. project in Begumpet, Hyderabad.
Project on 3 acres targets premium urban homes with 800 Cr revenue potential.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises signs JDA for 0.5M sq.ft. project in Begumpet, Hyderabad.
Project on 3 acres targets premium urban homes with 800 Cr revenue potential.

news.title:
Brigade Enterprises leases 4,859 acres in Kerala for IT development.
Lease agreement is for a tenure of 90 years.
news.summary:
Brigade Enterprises leases 4,859 acres in Kerala for IT development.
Lease agreement is for a tenure of 90 years.
